name: agentic-workflow-monorepo
description: The agentic-workflow plugins (OpenCode + Claude Code) and their shared core

scripts.prepare: npm run build -w @agentic-workflow/core && npm run build -w agentic-workflow-mcp
scripts.hub: npm run build -w @agentic-workflow/core && npm run build -w @agentic-workflow/hub && npm run start -w @agentic-workflow/hub --
scripts.test:all: npm run test -ws --if-present && npm run test:hooks
